questions: Describe the purpose of this service
What can I use this for?
answer: Memorybook Creator is an app designed to help people organize their important memories, similar to building a structured biography source.

questions: How much storage do I get?
What is the maximum upload size?
answer: The default vault upload capacity is 10GB. If you need more than that, usage can be expanded with a pay-as-you-go model.
For Memorybook Creator, files are stored locally on the server and protected with encryption.

questions: How many files have I uploaded?
How many files are in my vault?
How many uploads do I have?
What file types can I upload?
answer: Supported uploads: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, and MOV. Office files are converted to PDF on upload, and MOV files can be converted to MP4 in Video Converter.

questions: In which folder are my uploads kept?
Where is my vault located on the server?
answer: Your uploads are stored in your own browser-scoped folder on the server: uploads/<browser-id>/. You only see files tied to your current browser identity.

questions: How do I reset my folder identity?
How do I start a new browser session?
How can I create a new folder?
How do I change my browser ID?
answer: Use "Reset Folder Identity" in Files & Tools. That creates a new browser folder identity, so this browser stops showing files from the previous folder.

questions: What is the difference between App and General mode?
When should I use App mode?
When should I use General mode?
answer: Chat modes: App mode prioritizes local app logic and uploaded-file context. General mode skips local routing/RAG and asks the broader AI model directly.

questions: How do I open the Files and Tools panel?
How do I show the drawer?
How do I access the tools panel?
answer: Click the top-right "Files & Tools" button to open the right-side drawer for uploads, conversion, and file browsing.
